features: THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 1kg
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle, helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Ready to use, fragranced with eucalyptus oil and resealable bag 1kg. Ingredients Epsomsalt Directions Fill the bath with warm water, add the desired amount of Elysium Spa Eucalyptus Epsom salt and stir well until the salt is completely dissolved. Lie in the tub and relax for 15-20 minutes to absorb the natural properties of salt through the skin and relax your muscles. After the bath, dry yourself and cream your skin to maintain softness and suppleness. Safety Warning Always use caution when entering and exiting the bathtub. Avoid using extremely hot water to prevent burns. Keep the bathtub area free of clutter to prevent slipping. Do not ingest the product. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a physician.
